title: ditassa hastata
intro: Ditassa hastata, also known as the 'Indian Cup Plant', is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ditassa hastata include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiviral agent. In herbal preparations, Ditassa hastata is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
